nasb.text: Then King David said, “Call Bathsheba to me.” And she came into the king’s presence and stood before the king.

esv.text: Then King David answered, “Call Bathsheba to me.” So she came into the king’s presence and stood before the king.

cnv.text: 大衛回答說：“召拔示巴到我這裡來。”於是拔示巴來到王面前，站在那裡。

ccb.text: 于是，大卫王召见拔示芭。拔示芭立刻晋见，侍立在王面前。
